details.from_city_to_airport: Taxi from Dubai city center to Dubai Airport — 30 min, €30
details.arrival_transfer: Luxury SUV transfer from Miami Airport to hotel — 20 min, €65
activities: Check-in and freshen up at the hotel
Explore South Beach and enjoy the iconic Art Deco architecture
Dinner at the elegant Juvia with a rooftop view
Breakfast at the hotel buffet
Relax at Miami Beach, sunbathing and swimming
Lunch at The Beach Bar next to the shore
Visit the Lincoln Road Mall for shopping and leisure
Dinner at the exquisite Stubborn Seed

details.from_hotel_to_art_basel: Taxi to Wynwood Art District — 15 min, €20
activities: Breakfast at The Front Porch Cafe
Explore Wynwood Walls and local galleries
Lunch at Wynwood Kitchen & Bar
Take a guided tour of the Vizcaya Museum and Gardens
Dinner at the modern and upscale Makoto
Breakfast at the hotel
Go on a private yacht charter for a half-day cruise around Biscayne Bay
Lunch onboard with catered gourmet meals
Return to hotel and enjoy the pool
Dinner at the exclusive Prime 112

details.from_hotel_to_airport: Private transfer to Miami Airport — 20 min, €65
activities: Breakfast at a local café
Relax and enjoy hotel amenities until checkout
Light lunch at the hotel
Final shopping for souvenirs at Bayside Marketplace
